$comment: RAIL-NATIVE-COMPILE-LANE-COMPOSE-SMOKE-03. Target-owned compile facts for the ds-compose-smoke rail lane. The rail core reads this; it does not hardcode a Compose/Gradle branch. This is the non-pnpm analogue of a slice-2 AdmissionDescriptor: the target declares WHAT compiles it; the rail adjudicates the exit code. id is a RailTargetId, NOT a FrameworkId — this lane is not an admitted framework.
knownGaps: Runtime evidence is limited to compile success/failure. No simulator, no Robolectric, no compose.ui.test execution or claim — runtime admission is deferred to a later slice.
The valid fixture exercises Kotlin language constructs, not the androidx.compose runtime; full Compose Material3 compilation (which needs Android artifacts) is out of scope for this compile smoke.
